prompt: A dramatic vertical football transfer announcement poster for Erling Haaland joining Inter Milan, designed in a dark, high-contrast black and electric-blue palette with a gritty cinematic sports-graphic style. The composition features 2 layered portraits of the same player: one oversized close-up bust in the upper center-left, turned in profile and looking upward, showing slick blond hair tied into a short bun with shaved sides; and 1 mid-body action portrait in the lower center, wearing the club’s blue-and-black striped home jersey and raising one index finger upward in a victory gesture. Use a muscular athletic build, intense heroic presence, rim lighting, deep shadows, textured skin detail, and glossy hair highlights. The jersey should include a white sponsor wordmark across the chest, a small white swoosh-style logo, the round club crest, and a tricolor shield patch. Behind the player, place a huge glowing circular Inter-style emblem graphic as a backdrop. Add 3 visible club logos total: 1 small logo at the top right, 1 large fabric flag logo at the bottom left, and 1 crest on the shirt. At the bottom center, include a night view of a modern football stadium with bright floodlights, blending into painterly blue smoke and brush-stroke effects. Across the center, place the player surname in huge rough hand-painted lettering, partially obscured by the figure, plus a large handwritten-style number 9 on the right. Add 8 text elements around the design: top center small text “INTER MILAN”; upper left stacked name text with the player name and a blue “9”; left-middle slogan “NATO PER SEGNARE”; right side vertical text “I M INTER”; right-middle slogan “FORZA INTER PER SEMPRE”; lower right city text “SAN SIRO”; lower right small text “MILANO ITALIA”; bottom center small text “1908” and “LA BENEAMATA”. Also add 1 white signature scribble near the upper-left portrait. The background should be a layered collage of black grunge textures, blue ink splashes, scratches, smoke, and radial light, with a premium social-media sports poster finish, hyper-detailed, sharp, energetic, and poster-ready for a football meme or fan transfer reveal.
